purpose: Hidden machine-readable audit of what the canvas displays over the 55-second animated loop; this block does not participate in canonical ledger verification and does not face the viewer.
source_of_truth: Generated from the adjacent theorem-zero-ledger and renderer timing/alpha/camera rules in this HTML file.

visibility_policy.reason_separate_from_ledger: The renderer hard-verifies the canonical ledger by strict deep equality; adding audit keys to that ledger would cause failure.

loop.looping_rule: render time is taken modulo totalDuration, so 55.0s returns to the first_circle start state.

runtime_stages.broad_visual_purpose: One centre discloses fixed unit reach and six unit-neighbour generation.
Seven active centres repeat the construction, showing nominal generation and duplicate coordinate identification by implication.
Thirteen active centres resolve into the final coordinate-union catchment and native carrier direction families.

lawfulness_rules_used.station_rule: A substrate station is an integer viewer-native axial/barycentric coordinate pair (q,r).
lawfulness_rules_used.unit_neighbour_generation_rule: Each active centre generates six stations by adding offsets A-F.
lawfulness_rules_used.active_centre_rule: Only the declared stage active_centres are active centres for that stage.
lawfulness_rules_used.catchment_rule: Generated duplicates are identified by exact coordinate equality; catchment is active centres union unique generated perimeter stations.
lawfulness_rules_used.native_carrier_family_rule: Only q=constant, r=constant, and q+r=constant carrier families are used.
lawfulness_rules_used.radius_rule: radius_unit is fixed at 1; camera scaling does not alter the mathematical radius.
lawfulness_rules_used.viewport_rule: view_reach changes by stage and during the final 10 percent of each stage; this is camera behavior only.
lawfulness_rules_used.rendering_vs_substrate_distinction: Colours, glow, opacity, fades, circles, radii, chords, cells, and timing are presentation or overlay marks unless explicitly declared as substrate, which they are not.

construction_overlay_sequence.event: carrier families appear in first and seven stages as a windowed overlay
final field appears only in thirteen_circle_catchment; native carrier families accompany it

carrier_family_only_clarification.answer: The runtime has moments where construction circles, radii, chords, and cells have disappeared and the native carrier direction families dominate. In the final stage, however, the resolved catchment stations remain visible with the carrier families; it is not literally lines-only unless one ignores the station layer.
carrier_family_only_clarification.what_is_visible: Resolved 73-station catchment with q=constant, r=constant, and q+r=constant carrier families; construction circles and joins are absent.

possible_visual_misreadings.risk: screen coordinates mistaken for substrate coordinates
possible_visual_misreadings.caption: Screen position is projection only; substrate stations are integer axial (q,r).
No square grid is present; carrier families are triangular/native: q, r, and q+r constants.
Brightness and fading are rendering effects; coordinate equality decides station identity.

possible_visual_misreadings.risk: circle sweeps treated as substrate-defining circles
possible_visual_misreadings.caption: Circle sweeps are construction overlays showing fixed unit reach.
Radii, chords, and cells are instructional overlays and release before final field state.

possible_visual_misreadings.risk: duplicate overdraw read as extra points
possible_visual_misreadings.caption: Duplicate generated coordinates are identified as one station in the catchment.

possible_visual_misreadings.risk: camera zoom read as changing the unit
possible_visual_misreadings.caption: Viewport reach changes; radius_unit remains 1.

still_frame_extraction_plan.what_should_be_visible: six stations with radii from O
generated stations appearing around thirteen centres
resolved catchment stations begin with carrier families
73 resolved stations and native carrier families; construction joins absent
final field visible during camera return

final_verdict.communicates_measurement_clearly_enough_: partially; the first-circle construction is clear, but captions are needed for axial norm, duplicate identification, and camera scaling
final_verdict.most_important_caption: Viewport and opacity are rendering; station identity and measurement come from integer axial coordinates, six unit-neighbour offsets, fixed radius_unit=1, and native q/r/q+r carrier families.
